name: saab/engine_sas_unlock
purpose: Unlock SecurityAccess level $0B on the engine ECM so the SSA region can be written.
captured_coverage: preamble + seed step (0xC4DC). $27 0C key + ack not captured — SAS server was unreachable in that session.
important_corrections: CORRECTION 2026-05-11: Tech2Win does NOT send $10 02 StartDiagnosticSession before $27 0B. Our prior Android code had this wrong. The real preamble is $AA 01 01 (DynamicallyDefineDID).

steps.comment: DynamicallyDefineDID — actual Tech2Win preamble, observed in shim log.

steps.status: DEFINITION_FROM_SPEC — wire bytes confirmed by GMW3110 §8.8.5.1, but no shim capture yet of a successful ack
